reason: Resolved 3 remaining merge conflicts from `git merge origin/main` into PR #40. All three were auto-generated/encrypted artifacts where origin/main's version is authoritative: .kody/context/todo.md (restored rather than deleted, since the PR branch deletion was incidental), .kody/reports/ceo-performance-review.md (newer 'fourth consecutive week' cadence note with corrected 'dev branch exists' analysis), .kody/secrets.enc (encrypted vault — must be the live main copy, cannot be reconstructed). No conflict markers remain; `git diff --stat origin/main` is empty for the three resolved files (byte-identical to main).
